title: Sussy Mogus Discography
description: A mod containing all of Sussy Mogus' songs as music discs
body:
A mod containing all of Sussy Mogus' songs as music discs

https://open.spotify.com/artist/1y86gIBF82LrmRt6U8U2PB

Currently only drops from creepers!

Credit to Sussy Mogus for letting me make this mod and letting me use his songs in it.
